name: Google Drive
description: Search and browse files available to a Google Drive user and retrieve metadata for a specific file without downloading its content.

auth.hint: Enable Google Drive API in a Google Cloud project, complete OAuth 2.0 consent, and provide an access token with the drive.metadata.readonly scope.

tools.name: list_files
tools.description: List or search Google Drive files and folders visible to the authorized user.

params.name: q
params.description: Drive search query, such as trashed = false or a name, MIME type, parent, ownership, or modified-time condition.

params.name: pageSize
params.description: Maximum files per page; values above 1000 are coerced to 1000.

params.name: pageToken
params.description: Token from nextPageToken selecting the next result page.

params.name: orderBy
params.description: Comma-separated sort keys, optionally followed by desc, such as modifiedTime desc or name_natural.

params.name: driveId
params.description: Shared-drive identifier to search when using the drive corpus.

params.name: includeItemsFromAllDrives
params.description: Whether results can include items from both My Drive and shared drives.

tools.name: get_file_metadata
tools.description: Retrieve metadata for one Google Drive file or folder without downloading its content.

params.name: fileId
params.description: Identifier of the Drive file or folder.

params.name: supportsAllDrives
params.description: Whether the requesting application supports both My Drive and shared-drive items.

params.name: includeLabels
params.description: Comma-separated label IDs whose metadata should be included in labelInfo.
